rationale: The proposed homestead exemption increase under Tax Code §11.13(b) concerns property tax appraised value exemptions. Elec. Code §254.0401 governs internet availability of campaign finance reports. The two provisions address entirely unrelated subject matter.
_note: No conflict. Elec. Code §254.0401 pertains to public availability of political contribution and expenditure reports on the internet; it has no bearing on property tax homestead exemption amounts.
